data.content: 7420 planning complete. Implement a checked-in explicit harness based on the b7c0 expanded proof: local random proof page, Codex with default_tools_approval_mode="approve", OpenCode with permission wildcard "playwright_*":"allow", closed child stdin, fail-loud analyzer, and representative tool coverage across navigate/snapshot/click/type/press_key/evaluate/console/network. Keep live model calls out of default tests unless explicitly gated. Document that this proves a representative safe matrix, not literal every-tool execution unless the implementation adds a safe all-tool matrix.
